# Barista Journal

> Barista Journal is an iOS app for home espresso enthusiasts to track, learn, and improve every shot.

## Canonical Site
- https://www.baristajournalpro.com/

## Product Summary
- Personal espresso log with dose, yield, extraction time, and notes
- Built-in learning and troubleshooting guidance
- Waitlist available at /#waitlist

## Contact
- Use the waitlist form on the website for launch updates.
